feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: great_cto
entry.content: Engineering process for solo founders and teams up to 50 engineers. Agents do architecture, code review, QA, and security. You make two decisions per feature.

entry.title: agent-orchestra
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow system for Claude Code. Pipeline-based agent orchestration: Issue → Design → Plan → Implement → Review → PR.

entry.title: opentasks
entry.content: Universal task graph — link, query, and annotate work items across task systems

entry.title: whiteboard
entry.content: Collaborative Excalidraw whiteboard for Claude Code. Wraps the @kamiazya/whiteboard-mcp server and exposes the shared skills bundled with that package.

entry.title: kindex
entry.content: The memory layer Claude Code doesn't have. A persistent knowledge graph that learns from your conversations — your AI assistant never starts a session blind.

entry.title: bd
entry.content: Brilliant Directories integration. Manage members, posts, leads, reviews, web pages, redirects, email templates, forms, menus, tags, widgets, and post-type configurations on any Brilliant Directories website via the public hosted MCP at brilliantmcp.com. Bundles growth-automation skills (/bd:events researches local events and creates SEO-rich event posts; more skills coming).

entry.title: thumbgate
entry.content: One 👎 becomes a hard rule the agent cannot bypass. Captures thumbs-down feedback, distills it into PreToolUse Pre-Action Checks, enforced across every future Claude Code session.

entry.title: project-lifecycle
entry.content: Doc-first per-phase workflow skill: brainstorm → spec → plan → execute → dual-track smoke → handoff → PR → milestone-done. Includes cost-aware behaviors (offset+limit reads, compact output flags, codemap pattern, RTK/token-savior adoption guidance).

entry.title: linkedin-skills
entry.content: 10 Claude Code and Codex skills for LinkedIn marketing: post writing, comment drafting, reply handler, hook extractor, humanizer (rewrite + audit + emoji + detector + rules sub-tools), profile optimizer, content planner, employee advocacy, thread monitor (author replies), engager analytics (likers + commenters ICP segmentation).

entry.title: corvus-star
entry.content: Corvus Star (CStar) kernel as a Claude Code plugin. Provides PennyOne memory, per-OAuth user profiles, and keyring-backed secret access for the ENM business suite.

entry.title: cli-printing-press
entry.content: Generate production Go CLIs from API descriptions or OpenAPI specs

entry.title: design-is-code
entry.content: Transform UML sequence diagrams and decision tables into Java tests and code. The DisC methodology makes design the contract, code the consequence.

entry.title: deepeval
entry.content: Skills for adding DeepEval evaluations, tracing, datasets, Confident AI reports, and iterative improvement loops to AI applications.

entry.title: Dev10x
entry.content: v0.85.0 — 69 skills for structured commits, PR lifecycle, branch hygiene, ticket management, task tracking, code review, scoping, and QA automation in Claude Code.

entry.title: resy-mcp
entry.content: Resy reservation management for Claude — search restaurants, book tables, manage reservations, favorites, and Priority Notify via natural language

entry.title: frontend-visualqa
entry.content: Local visual QA for frontends with Yutori Navigator and Playwright

entry.title: inkbox
entry.content: Inkbox email and phone SDK skills for Claude Code.

entry.title: auto-claude-skills
entry.content: Enables agentic PDLC in Claude Code with phase-aware skill routing, guardrails, and workflow state recovery

entry.title: workflow
entry.content: Structured workflow orchestration for AI agents via finite-state machines.

entry.title: uipath
entry.content: UiPath plugin for Claude Code — custom skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers for UiPath RPA workflows, UI automation, UI testing, Python coded agents and UiPath troubleshoot

entry.title: unterrichtsplanung-core
entry.content: Lehrkraft-Plugin für Unterrichtsplanung im Cowork-Mode: TUV-Generation (Tägliche Unterrichtsvorbereitung), Sequenz-Planung, Material-Drafts, LehrplanPLUS-Bayern-Verankerung. Pilot-Fächer GPG/M/WiB Mittelschule R7+R8. Daten-Schutz by-design (Plugin verarbeitet KEINE personenbezogenen Daten — § 26 BayDSG-konform, ADR 0022 Amendment).

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 27 modes, 39-agent ensemble, v3.7.3 + v3.8 L3 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.0 cross-index triangulation, v3.10 triangulation policy layer, v3.11 deterministic citation verification gate (#182).

entry.title: swarm
entry.content: Launch agent teams for any kind of work — coding, writing, diagnosis, and more

entry.title: tandem
entry.content: Edit and iterate on documents with any MCP-capable AI. Claude is the default and best-supported client today.

entry.title: claude-code-config
entry.content: Battle-tested configuration system for Claude Code agents: 28 architectural principles (incl. P-28 Feature-Layer Architecture for project-knowledge-as-a-navigable-tree), 19 safety hooks, 23 skills (incl. /layer-new + /feature-new for ULTRAPACK-style feature narratives), 16 alternative comparisons, 12 templates (incl. extended kb-skeleton with docs/layers/), diagnostic scripts (incl. build_kb_graph.py + validate_kb_links.py). Pairs with mclaude for multi-session coordination.

entry.title: sq
entry.content: Agent skill for the sq CLI: SLQ and native SQL, sources and handles, output formats, inspect/diff/tbl, and per-driver notes for databases and file formats.

entry.title: codemap
entry.content: Codebase structural index - scan Python projects once, query the import graph for blast-radius and coupling before touching code — Python projects only

entry.title: pr-shepherd
entry.content: Autonomous PR CI monitor and review-comment resolver for agentic coding tools

entry.title: spectra
entry.content: Capture screenshots, videos, and polished demo clips — spotlight focus, lower-third captions, and a tagged library — across web, macOS, and iOS

entry.title: outsystems
entry.content: Edit, publish, deploy, and search OutSystems apps from your AI assistant.

entry.title: chameleon
entry.content: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entry.title: twake-guidelines
entry.content: Linagora Twake coding guidelines as Claude Code skills — React, JavaScript, Cozy Client, Java, Go, Git conventions

entry.title: apple-notes
entry.content: Manage Apple Notes through natural language - create, search, read, update, delete, and organize notes and folders (macOS only)

entry.title: search-research
entry.content: Unified search and research system with async concurrent execution, HyDE enhancement, and 11 web providers. Replaces deprecated unified-search (EOL: 2026-09-01). pip-installable Python library with Claude Code plugin layer.

entry.title: zoom-skills
entry.content: Skills for the Zoom Developer Platform: REST APIs, Meeting SDK, Video SDK, MCP servers, webhooks, Team Chat, Phone, Contact Center, and authentication workflows

entry.title: todoist
entry.content: Todoist for Claude Code — manage tasks, projects, labels, and workflows from your terminal.

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Linlin's curated Claude Code configuration: workflow rules, skills, hooks, plugin recommendations, tooling preferences, and project templates. Install once, then run /init-agent-config in any new project to scaffold it with the relevant subset.

entry.title: hxgdzyuyi-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for GitHub data analysis including contributor filtering by region and batch processing of repository mentionable users

entry.title: deckify
entry.content: Stop making slides. Let AI build them in HTML — the medium it was born to write in. Give deckify any brand URL; in minutes you get a brand-faithful Design System markdown plus a verified 9-slide HTML demo deck.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: founder-os
entry.content: An operating system for owners running on Claude Code. 87 skills, 38 commands, zero-git install (download the ZIP, extract, say "set up Founder OS"; the OS installs and wires git for you later on one yes via "own my history"), per-session change snapshots with a one-command restore per file (/founder-os:changes, no git needed), capture-anywhere inbox (catch-up sweeps phone captures into the brain through a self-teaching names glossary), invisible version control (say "save my work", "what changed", "undo to before this morning", "back this up" and the OS wraps git for you), on-demand liveness reads (/strategic-read for a 5-section state-of-the-OS report, /log-reply for thread ingest, /since-last-session for the delta since the marker), brand voice layer (operator voice + per-brand voice for multi-brand ecosystems), campaign-from-theme with funnel gating, review-responder for incoming customer messages, execution queue with 3-item ACTIVE cap, substrate health check, persistent memory, decision tracking, six role modes, structured cadence, voice and brand profiles, knowledge notes, stable entry IDs, token-aware progressive query, opt-in observation log, weekly observation rollup, private-tag exclusion filter, graph query, audit report, readiness check, source ingest, wiki lint, wiki graph builder, approval gates, delivery ship checks, legal reference layer, runtime brain snapshot, brain-pass synthesis, today brief wrapper, and a natural-language menu of capabilities tailored to current state. Talk to Claude in plain English or run /founder-os:setup to get started.

entry.title: master-skill
entry.content: FoJin-powered Buddhist AI persona framework — source-grounded, boundary-aware, fidelity-tested, runtime-ready. 15 prebuilt masters across 印度/汉传/藏传/南传 plus compare, debate, and curriculum meta-skills.

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entry.title: espresso
entry.content: Concentrated Claude. Zero fluff, max power per token.

entry.title: claudeclaw2
entry.content: Multi-channel bridge for Claude Code: per-channel tmux-hosted agents driven by Telegram / Discord / Slack / LINE

entry.title: vgv-wingspan
entry.content: VGV Wingspan - AI-native workflows following Very Good Ventures best practices.

entry.title: amaris-consulting
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Amaris Consulting branded deliverables, brand tools, and strategic deliverable planning

entry.title: sig
entry.content: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entry.title: logseq-brain
entry.content: Persistent memory for Claude using a dedicated Logseq graph. Save and load project context, decisions, and progress across sessions and devices.

entry.title: ai-config
entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: 200iqlabs-agent-skills
entry.content: Business advisor AI agent skills for founders and small companies

entry.title: anton-core
entry.content: Personal AI assistant — knowledge, tasks, code graph, session intelligence

entry.title: gnomcp
entry.content: Gno smart-contract skill + MCP server for gno.land: interrealm semantics, security auditing, Render() authoring, idiomatic patterns, and on-chain tools (read, deploy, call, sessions).

entry.title: void-grimoire
entry.content: Additive Claude Code skills, agents, and rules: session journaling, learned-correction persistence, prompt expansion, context discipline, and TypeScript/web rule baselines

entry.title: plannotator-effective-html
entry.content: plannotator-effective-html — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: fable-discipline
entry.content: A discipline pack for agentic software work: milestone workflow (research → build → adversarial-review), artifact build (spec → TDD → review → live-validate → ship), research investigation (pre-register → controls → calibrated negatives → read-the-primary), measurement pipeline (complete gap-accounting → evidence-as-proof → recurring run → decision report), design workflow (DESIGN.md contract → tool-generated screens → port to code → versioned redesign), diagnostic loop (reproduce → observe boundaries → one hypothesis, smallest probe → fix at root), agent orchestration (model routing + verifier-≠-author + worktree isolation), compounding memory (5-stage STATE.md + Verified-by tags), and per-task execution rules. Nine auto-triggering skills plus /milestone-research, /milestone-build, /milestone-review. Generic and repo-agnostic — reads each repo's own CLAUDE.md for specifics.

entry.title: rag-reviewer
entry.content: Agentic PR review: hybrid RAG + code graph via MCP, review skills for Claude Code

entry.title: aiops
entry.content: AI-assisted dev workflow: grill, plan, implement, hard gates

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Build loop engineers: a file-based knowledge base your agents read/write (loops), plus a codebase harness (dev-local stack, e2e gate, an isolated cloud box per agent via crabbox, and verify-before-ship) so loops can run, test, and ship code autonomously.

entry.title: senderkit
entry.content: Build complete messaging experiences right from your AI coding agent. Add transactional email, SMS, push, and web-push — welcome emails, OTPs, receipts, and more — then create templates, send, and monitor every message your app sends. One messaging layer, no provider lock-in.

entry.title: codey
entry.content: Live legibility for Claude Code: narrates what Claude is doing and warns when it's stuck.

entry.title: brag
entry.content: Turn the current project into a short, polished, shareable launch video using HyperFrames.

entry.title: cc-transcript
entry.content: Investigate Claude Code transcripts token-efficiently via the cc-transcript CLI: list, stats, grep, and show instead of reading raw JSONL.

entry.title: scalpel
entry.content: Surgical precision skills for AI-assisted development: focused workflows, careful implementation, and disciplined delivery

entry.title: sdd-engineering-team
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development engineering team: an orchestrator plus seven specialist personas (product, project, full-stack engineer, quality engineer, QA analyst, debugger, UX designer) and an eleven-agent speckit generation pipeline. Ships with reusable skills, MCP server config, dashboard scripts, and runtime guardrail hooks.

entry.title: beaver
entry.content: Skills for product definition, system design, software architecture, specs, and verification — structure before code. Bundles defining-products, designing-systems, architecting-software, specifying-features, crafting-code, and verifying-completion.

entry.title: spec
entry.content: Spec-driven development plugin: research → ask → propose → HARD GATE → apply → verify → archive, enforced by 4 hooks (TBD scan / approval gate / archive audit / verify reminder), with scope-dispatched dev agents and a fresh-context verifier agent

entry.title: jose-claudinho
entry.content: Your AI assistant manager for Sport5 Fantasy World Cup 2026 — reads the market, your team and rival top teams, learns from weekly snapshots, and recommends transfers, captain and lineup under the official rules.

entry.title: humanizer-ru
entry.content: Kills AI smell in Russian text. 54 patterns across 12 categories, 20 hard bans, 3 modes (rewrite / audit / targeted fix), voice calibration, quad-pass audit, 2025-2026 stylistic fingerprints. | Убивает запах нейросети в русском тексте. 54 паттерна в 12 категориях, 20 жёстких банов, 3 режима, калибровка голоса, quad-pass аудит, стилистические фингерпринты 2025-2026.

entry.title: ultragoal
entry.content: Tell Claude what you want once; it works until the job is verifiably done, then saves what it learned. Goals with checkable specs, independent verification, and a memory that grows.

entry.title: artsonia-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for Artsonia — natural-language access to student-art portfolios, comments, and fans

entry.title: autumn
entry.content: Domain knowledge, CLI wrappers, scaffolding commands, and code review for the autumn-web Rust framework

entry.title: gander
entry.content: A live Hollywood-Squares dashboard of your Claude Code agents and sub-agents — each one an animated avatar that acts out what it's doing (thinking, coding, reading, spawning, testing, erroring), with a recursive hierarchy view and animated information flow between parent and child agents. Driven automatically by Claude Code hooks.

entry.title: agentic-os
entry.content: Self-improving agent memory system with 9 skills (session lifecycle, memory management, knowledge sync, policy-gated self-improve) and 6 hooks, including a PreToolUse shell circuit breaker. Identity growth via gated candidate queues; scaling thresholds live in one SSoT script. MCP-Tool-Bridge Policy enforces clear roles (tool/introspection/knowledge) and hard no-gos against MCP-as-truth or cross-project mutation.

entry.title: godot
entry.content: Bundle of Godot 4 skills (C# and GDScript both first-class): GDScript web/mobile export and portrait-pet conventions, engine quirks, UI authoring, version-aware API lookup, asset generation, scaffolding, scene building, and headless visual QA.

entry.title: kimi-code-plugin-cc
entry.content: Bridge headless CLI agents (Kimi Code, Codex, …) into Claude Code with review and planning loops.

entry.title: agent-rally-point
entry.content: Agent Rally Point — repo-local coordination surface for parallel coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini). Records claims, checks write boundaries, routes handoffs, and exposes room state via the rally CLI. Skills: agent-rally-point (per-session loop), rally-workflows (fan-out + dynamic-workflows protocol), mini-loop (per-task quality gate). Advisory-only hooks auto-fire on SessionStart + PreToolUse to surface room awareness and deconflict before edits — never blocks. Backend: rally CLI (cargo install --path crates/rally-cli).

entry.title: t3
entry.content: Personal code factory for multi-repo projects

entry.title: overcast
entry.content: Give any agent senses (video/audio/image understanding) and OSINT reach (search/capture/monitor), organized around an investigation case. Built on pi with the tinycloud/Cloudglue perception backend.

entry.title: sigma
entry.content: Personal AI workflow toolkit for data science & AI engineering. Research-first, spec-driven, loop-engineered pipeline (research → propose → blueprint → spec → tasks → implement-task → verify → loop), plus the Hermes conductor, a kanban board, and HTML artifact export.

entry.title: y2
entry.content: A minimal Claude plugin written in Python that implements hook handlers and logs all hook invocations.

entry.title: lakebase-app-dev-kit
entry.content: Opinionated workflows for agentic software development on paired Lakebase branches: a Spec-First Test-Driven Development (SFTDD) state-machine (role agents + HITL gates), an SCM branch-lifecycle workflow (claim, PR, CI, merge), and a release workflow (promotion across tiers). Every git branch is paired with a Lakebase branch.

entry.title: open-second-brain
entry.content: Plugin-first second brain package for AI agents and humans.

entry.title: oats-skills
entry.content: Vue, Tauri, architecture, security, and MCP-debugging skills tailored to the oats desktop app.

entry.title: open-agent-hub
entry.content: Unified capability management center for Skills, Agents, and Commands.

entry.title: kenken-skills
entry.content: kenken-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: stackchanmcp
entry.content: Stack-chan physical event channel for Claude Code — touch tap / stroke notifications from the desktop robot delivered as Channels messages.

entry.title: jahns-workflow
entry.content: SSOT-anchored agentic development workflow harness: Socratic project ideation that forges the north-star SSOT, one-click project setup, a structured task-registry CLI (read/mutate/archive without slurping the file) with a global naming convention, zero-token roadmap rendering, round closeout, a per-round markdown review request for an external reviewer that reads the repo over git, and verbatim review ingestion (plus an optional SHA-bound PR review-cycle merge gate).

entry.title: pdd
entry.content: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entry.title: vibo-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for Vibo (vibodj.com) — plan & manage event music, song requests, ideas, guests, and playlists via natural language

entry.title: scout
entry.content: Autonomous knowledge management and daily briefing system. Monitors your work tools (Slack, Calendar, Linear, GitHub, etc.), synthesizes findings into a persistent knowledge base with a formal ontology, and delivers daily action items — all running unattended via scheduled Claude Code sessions. Six session types: Morning Briefing, Consolidation, Dreaming, Research, interactive Work sessions, and Meta Review. Pre-session hooks pre-compute KB staleness, recent git activity, PR state, and Claude Code session summaries before each run, trading a few seconds of shell work for large token savings inside the session.

entry.title: baseline
entry.content: Drift-correction routes that inject trusted baseline docs through Claude Code and Codex hooks.

entry.title: falsegreen-skill
entry.content: LLM-based semantic analysis for false-positive test detection. Applies the J1-J6 judgment framework across Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Robot Framework, plus semantic patterns no static tool can see.

entry.title: beads-superpowers
entry.content: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 6 more AI coding agents. Composable skills + persistent task memory.

entry.title: baz
entry.content: Baz codebase exploration — indexed search across your org's repos via MCP.

entry.title: pve-bindsnap
entry.content: Snapshot and clone Proxmox LXC containers that have bind/device mounts. Ships the proxmox-bindsnap skill: install, verify, configure (BINDSNAP- markers, checksum guard) and operate pve-bindsnap.

entry.title: shed
entry.content: Guidance for using the shed CLI: persistent VM-based dev environments — create, attach, tunnels, sync, and multi-server workflows.

entry.title: talos
entry.content: End-to-end SDLC orchestration kit for Claude Code, including role agents, slash commands, skills, rules, and runtime hooks.

entry.title: tpn-labs-skills
entry.content: Curated Agent Skills used day-to-day at TPN Labs — clarify, dependabot-pr-fixer, ui-ux-pro-max, and more.

entry.title: cybersecurity-skills
entry.content: 817 cybersecurity skills covering web security, pentesting, DFIR, threat intelligence, cloud security, malware analysis, and more.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 48 agents, 184 skills, 68 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: infra-lens-mcp
entry.content: Infra Lens MCP plugin for infrastructure visibility, host inventory, operational snapshots, baselines, and drift review.

entry.title: nature-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entry.title: grill-each-other
entry.content: Dialectic claim discipline for AI agents: scholastic vocabulary, peer-grill file-based reconciliation, runnable verifiers/falsifiers, multi-agent ratification, fleet-ratify N-agent attestation, permutation NxN fleet topology ratification. Synthesis: an unexamined claim does not exist.

entry.title: cybersecurity
entry.content: AI-powered cybersecurity code review with 8 specialist agents, OWASP Top 10:2021, CWE Top 25:2024, MITRE ATT&CK v15, and framework-aware false-positive suppression

entry.title: ai-eng
entry.content: AI-Driven Engineering workflow commands for managing issues, tasks, implementation, and PRs.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 60 agents, 232 skills, 75 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: plan-op
entry.content: Plan an entire operation without executing it: design spec, implementation plan, breakdown, and weak-model-proof task briefs written into the target repo.

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 27 modes, 39-agent ensemble, v3.7.3 + v3.8 L3 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.0 cross-index triangulation, v3.10 triangulation policy layer, v3.11 deterministic citation verification gate (#182).

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: ralph-wiggum-marketer
entry.content: Autonomous AI copywriter agent that creates SaaS marketing content while you sleep. Uses the Ralph Wiggum pattern for iterative content creation from trends, research, and communications.

entry.title: earth2studio
entry.content: Earth2Studio skills for weather and climate AI — discover models, install the package, fetch data, run deterministic forecasts, and create new data source or prognostic model wrappers.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: java-dev
entry.content: A collection of agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules for AI Agentic development workflow

entry.title: llmock
entry.content: Fixture authoring guidance for @copilotkit/aimock

entry.title: ccaf-exam
entry.content: Interactive practice exam for the Claude Certified Architect – Foundations certification. 149 scenario-based questions across 5 domains, run in your terminal via /ccaf-exam with scaled scoring and per-domain breakdown.

entry.title: antigravity-skills
entry.content: Professional Agent Skills collection for full-stack development, logic planning, and multimedia processing.

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: code-review-graph
entry.content: Persistent incremental knowledge graph for token-efficient, context-aware code reviews with Claude Code

entry.title: convex-skills
entry.content: Agent skills for building production-ready Convex applications. Includes best practices, functions, realtime patterns, schema validation, file storage, security audits, and more.

entry.title: peeragent
entry.content: Delegate arbitrary task work from Claude Code to a peer local coding agent (Codex, Claude, Gemini, Z.AI GLM 5.2)

entry.title: legalize-kr
entry.content: Use Legalize-KR public Korean legal datasets, including laws, court precedents, administrative rules, and local ordinances.

entry.title: netsuite-suitecloud
entry.content: NetSuite agent skills from Oracle — authoring guidance for SuiteCloud Development Framework (SDF) objects and UIF single-page-app components, plus runtime guidance for the NetSuite AI Service Connector.

entry.title: firebase
entry.content: Claude plugin for Firebase that installs the Firebase MCP server and helps to manage Firebase projects, add backend services, add AI features, deploy & host apps, and more

entry.title: stagehand
entry.content: Browser automation skill for Claude Code using Stagehand. Automate web interactions, extract data, and navigate websites using natural language.

entry.title: systems-architecture
entry.content: Systems architecture and distributed systems skills including Designing Data-Intensive Applications (Martin Kleppmann), System Design Interview (Alex Xu), Clean Architecture (Robert C. Martin), Release It! (Michael Nygard), High Performance Browser Networking (Ilya Grigorik), and Team Topologies (Skelton & Pais)

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 38 agents, 156 skills, 72 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: fullstack-dev-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive skill pack with 66 specialized skills for full-stack developers: 12 language experts (Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, C++, Swift, Kotlin, C#, PHP, Java, SQL, JavaScript), 10 backend frameworks, 6 frontend/mobile, plus infrastructure, DevOps, security, and testing. Features progressive disclosure architecture for 50% faster loading.

entry.title: browser-harness
entry.content: Direct browser control via CDP. Drives the user's real Chrome (or a Browser Use cloud browser) with coordinate clicks, screenshots, and Python helpers — no selector hunting. Requires the one-time `browser-harness` CLI install (see the skill's references/install.md).

entry.title: auge
entry.content: auge — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: superpowers-symfony
entry.content: A Symfony-focused toolkit for Claude Code providing TDD (Pest/PHPUnit), Doctrine ORM, API Platform, Messenger, Voters, quality checks (PHP-CS-Fixer/PHPStan), and pragmatic architecture patterns - Docker Compose and Symfony Docker (FrankenPHP) compatible

entry.title: webwright
entry.content: Turn your coding agent into a SOTA browser agent. Drives a local Playwright workspace via one bash command at a time, saving screenshots and an action log into final_runs/run_<id>/, and visually self-verifies the result.

entry.title: chrome-devtools-mcp
entry.content: Reliable automation, in-depth debugging, and performance analysis in Chrome using Chrome DevTools and Puppeteer

entry.title: cavemaenggu
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode (caveman + 맹구 fork). Cuts ~75% of tokens while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a smart caveman; switches to Korean 개조식/전보체 for the maeng-gu family.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 64 agents, 261 skills, 84 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: pua
entry.content: PUA Motivator -- forces Claude Code to exhaust all solutions before giving up, using corporate PUA rhetoric (Alibaba, ByteDance, Huawei, Tencent, Netflix, Musk, Jobs). Applies to all task types: code, research, writing, deployment, infra.

entry.title: automatised-pipeline
entry.content: Rust MCP server that indexes ANY codebase into a LadybugDB property graph — source in 10 languages with full AST, plus docs/config/binaries as File nodes (.js→Imports, Markdown→References). Resolves imports and call chains, detects communities via Leiden, traces execution flows from entry points, and exposes 24 MCP tools to agents — index_codebase, query_graph, get_symbol, get_impact, get_context, semantic_diff, and more.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 63 agents, 249 skills, 79 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 67 agents, 271 skills, 92 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: opendirectory-gtm-skills
entry.content: A collection of GTM skills for Claude Code

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: planning-with-files
entry.content: Manus-style persistent markdown files for planning, progress tracking, and knowledge storage. Works with Claude Code, Kiro, Clawd CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Continue, and 11+ AI coding assistants.

entry.title: ask-gemini
entry.content: Ask Gemini CLI for a second opinion on code reviews, architecture decisions, and general questions

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: mattpocock-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: bountyforge
entry.content: BountyForge bug bounty workflows for Claude Code: recon, validation, reporting, Web2, Web3, mobile, and AI security.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC operator layer - 63 agents, 251 skills, 79 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, selective install profiles, and production-ready workflows for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, and related agent harnesses

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 67 agents, 277 skills, 93 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: audio-hooks
entry.content: Audio notifications + AI-controlled config for Claude Code, Cursor IDE, and Codex CLI events. 26 hooks, native matcher routing, TTS, webhooks, status line, rate-limit alerts. Auto-bridges to Cursor IDE 3.2.16+; native install via 'audio-hooks install --cursor' or 'audio-hooks install --codex'.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: ralph-loop
entry.content: Continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Run Claude in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion.

entry.title: session-report
entry.content: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage — tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts — from local ~/.claude/projects transcripts.

entry.title: playwright
entry.content: Browser automation and end-to-end testing MCP server by Microsoft. Enables Claude to interact with web pages, take screenshots, fill forms, click elements, and perform automated browser testing workflows.

entry.title: rust-analyzer-lsp
entry.content: Rust language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: skill-creator
entry.content: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

entry.title: security-guidance
entry.content: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: math-olympiad
entry.content: Solve competition math (IMO, Putnam, USAMO) with adversarial verification that catches what self-verification misses. Fresh-context verifiers attack proofs with specific failure patterns. Calibrated abstention over bluffing.

entry.title: pyright-lsp
entry.content: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence

entry.title: pr-review-toolkit
entry.content: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

entry.title: learning-output-style
entry.content: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points (mimics the unshipped Learning output style)

entry.title: typescript-lsp
entry.content: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence

entry.title: mcp-server-dev
entry.content: Skills for designing and building MCP servers that work seamlessly with Claude — guides you through deployment models (remote HTTP, MCPB, local), tool design patterns, auth, and interactive MCP apps.

entry.title: linear
entry.content: Linear issue tracking integration. Create issues, manage projects, update statuses, search across workspaces, and streamline your software development workflow with Linear's modern issue tracker.

entry.title: plugin-dev
entry.content: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance

entry.title: playground
entry.content: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button

entry.title: php-lsp
entry.content: PHP language server (Intelephense) for code intelligence

entry.title: terraform
entry.content: The Terraform MCP Server provides seamless integration with Terraform ecosystem, enabling advanced automation and interaction capabilities for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) development.

entry.title: serena
entry.content: Semantic code analysis MCP server providing intelligent code understanding, refactoring suggestions, and codebase navigation through language server protocol integration.

entry.title: lua-lsp
entry.content: Lua language server for code intelligence

entry.title: ruby-lsp
entry.content: Ruby language server for code intelligence and analysis

entry.title: swift-lsp
entry.content: Swift language server (SourceKit-LSP) for code intelligence

entry.title: hookify
entry.content: Easily create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns

entry.title: phantom-wallet-mcp
entry.content: Execute wallet operations via the Phantom MCP server — get addresses, sign transactions, transfer tokens, buy/swap tokens, and sign messages across Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Sui

entry.title: squads
entry.content: Squads Protocol for multisig wallets, smart accounts, account abstraction, and Grid stablecoin rails

entry.title: ruflo-agentdb
entry.content: AgentDB memory controllers with HNSW vector search, RuVector embeddings, and causal knowledge graphs

entry.title: metaplex
entry.content: Metaplex Protocol for NFTs, Core, Token Metadata, Bubblegum, Candy Machine, and Umi framework

entry.title: laravel-boost
entry.content: Laravel development toolkit MCP server. Provides intelligent assistance for Laravel applications including Artisan commands, Eloquent queries, routing, migrations, and framework-specific code generation.

entry.title: ruflo-plugin-creator
entry.content: Scaffold, validate, and publish new Claude Code plugins with proper structure and MCP tool wiring

entry.title: ruflo-security-audit
entry.content: Security review, dependency scanning, policy gates, and CVE monitoring

entry.title: ruflo-autopilot
entry.content: Autonomous /loop-driven task completion with learning, prediction, and progress tracking

entry.title: ruflo-loop-workers
entry.content: Cache-aware /loop workers and CronCreate background automation

entry.title: context7
entry.content: Upstash Context7 MCP server for up-to-date documentation lookup. Pull version-specific documentation and code examples directly from source repositories into your LLM context.

entry.title: gitlab
entry.content: GitLab DevOps platform integration. Manage repositories, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, issues, and wikis. Full access to GitLab's comprehensive DevOps lifecycle tools.

entry.title: phantom-connect
entry.content: Build wallet-connected Solana apps with Phantom Connect SDK — social login (Google/Apple), transaction signing, token gating, and NFT minting across React, React Native, and Browser SDK

entry.title: manifest
entry.content: Manifest DEX for orderbook trading, SDK integration, wrapper and global account flows, reverse orders, and frontend market reads on Solana

entry.title: clangd-lsp
entry.content: C/C++ language server (clangd) for code intelligence

entry.title: csharp-lsp
entry.content: C# language server for code intelligence

entry.title: ruflo-wasm
entry.content: Sandboxed WASM agent creation, execution, and gallery sharing

entry.title: raydium
entry.content: Raydium Protocol for AMM pools, CLMM, CPMM, LaunchLab token launches, and liquidity infrastructure

entry.title: ruflo-workflows
entry.content: Visual workflow automation with templates, orchestration, and lifecycle management

entry.title: ruflo-swarm
entry.content: Agent teams, swarm coordination, Monitor streams, and worktree isolation

entry.title: ruflo-intelligence
entry.content: Self-learning neural intelligence with SONA patterns, trajectory learning, and intelligent model routing

entry.title: commit-commands
entry.content: Streamline your git workflow with simple commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests

entry.title: firebase
entry.content: Google Firebase MCP integration. Manage Firestore databases, authentication, cloud functions, hosting, and storage. Build and manage your Firebase backend directly from your development workflow.

entry.title: gopls-lsp
entry.content: Go language server for code intelligence and refactoring
